title: Design spec (DES) front-matter
description: Deterministic contract for the YAML front-matter of every specs/design/DES-##.md file. Produced in Phase 3 (Design & Solution Decomposition). The COMPILER zones (traceability chain FEAT<-REQ<-INTK, NFR carry-over, provenance) are regenerated verbatim from the member feature spec by scripts/compile_design.py and guarded by spec_hash; the FILL zones (8 decision axes + rationale, solution, observability, open-questions) are authored by the Copilot cloud agent grounded via Microsoft Learn MCP. Body-zone, traceability and hash rules are checked by scripts/validate_design.py.

satisfies.description: The atomic REQ ids this design satisfies. Must equal the member_reqs of implements_feature.

implements_feature.description: The single approved feature spec this design realises (1:1).

spec_hash.description: SHA-256 over the COMPILER zones (lowercase hex). Recomputed and checked by scripts/compile_design.py and scripts/validate_design.py.
